name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement

---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Describe the limitation or pain point.

## Proposed solution

How you'd like this to work. Be as specific as you can.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about, and why they're less ideal.

## Additional context

Any other context — related issues, links to similar implementations, diagrams.
